name: chat-language-model-loader
description: Register OpenAI-compatible models from /root/models.json using the VS Code language model provider API.

commands.title: Load Local OAI Models From File

chatLanguageModelLoader.loadOnStartup.description: When no persisted models exist, load /root/models.json on extension startup.

chatLanguageModelLoader.sourceModelsPath.description: Absolute path to the source model JSON file.
